meaning: n.产于拉塔基亚附近的一种上等香烟土耳其烟草,拉塔基亚(叙利亚西北部港市,是拉塔基亚省省会)
examples: A full English style flake with a healthy dose of Cyprian Latakia.
Soft and sweet, rich in light Orientals and Carolina tobaccos, with somewhat less Latakia than 2040. A fine medium mixture.
A characteristic English Mixture, developed from mellow Georgian Virginias, Black Cavendish, Mexican Burley's and Cyprian Latakia, a classic. Mild to medium strength.
These were illicitly transferred to the German merchant ship Victoria at Syria's Latakia port.
One of Syria's latest flash points is Haffa, a mountaintop village overlooking the coastal western city of Latakia.
